metadata.title: Q3 weekly orders by region
metadata.description: Demo notebook — synthetic orders rolled up by week and region.
metadata.author: RedNotebook AI

cells.source:
## Q3 weekly orders by region

A quick weekly cut of the synthetic orders dataset — *NA, EMEA, APAC, LATAM*
across the last 90 days. After running, peek at the **Profile** tab for
per-column distributions, then hit **Summarize result** for the AI brief.

cells.sql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', order_date)::date AS week,
  region,
  COUNT(*)                             AS orders,
  ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2)               AS revenue,
  ROUND(AVG(revenue), 2)               AS avg_order
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE '2025-01-01' + INTERVAL (i % 90) DAY AS order_date,
    (['NA', 'EMEA', 'APAC', 'LATAM'])[1 + (i % 4)] AS region,
    20 + (i % 17) * 11 + RANDOM() * 30 AS revenue
  FROM range(0, 800) t(i)
)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2
